decision1_substring: The autopilot shall change states from TRANSITION to NOMINAL when the system is supported and sensor data is good.
decision2_substring: The autopilot shall change states from TRANSITION to NOMINAL when the system is supported and sensor data is good.
decision3_substring: The autopilot shall change states from TRANSITION to NOMINAL when the system is supported and sensor data is good.
output_structured_natural_language: whenever supported & good, after 5 ticks satisfy state_is_NOMINAL
